_doc: Machine hosting the failing job. The robot version (23.4.0) is old — old robots report raw OS/CLR exit codes (0xE0434352) instead of translating them to the managed exception. Upgrading the robot makes the real .NET exception surface directly in the job Info/logs.

Data.Name: ReportingRuntime
Data.Description: Runtime template for the ReportingOps folder; hosts run an older robot build.
